title: melilotus infestus var. rigidus
intro: Melilotus infestus var. rigidus, also known as rigid melilot, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it effective in relieving pain and reducing swelling. The health benefits of rigid melilot include its potential to improve digestion, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rigid melilot can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
